name: Docker Image Vulnerability Scan (Trivy)

steps.name: HIGH/CRITICAL CVEs in Image
steps.statusMessage:
[CRITICAL] CVE-2026-31789 in libcrypto3 3.5.5-r0 → openssl: OpenSSL: Heap buffer overflow on 32-bit systems from large X.509 certificate processing
[CRITICAL] CVE-2026-31789 in libssl3 3.5.5-r0 → openssl: OpenSSL: Heap buffer overflow on 32-bit systems from large X.509 certificate processing
[HIGH] CVE-2026-28387 in libcrypto3 3.5.5-r0 → openssl: OpenSSL: Arbitrary code execution due to use-after-free in DANE TLSA authentication
[HIGH] CVE-2026-28387 in libssl3 3.5.5-r0 → openssl: OpenSSL: Arbitrary code execution due to use-after-free in DANE TLSA authentication
[HIGH] CVE-2026-28388 in libcrypto3 3.5.5-r0 → openssl: OpenSSL: Denial of Service due to NULL pointer dereference in delta CRL processing
[HIGH] CVE-2026-28388 in libssl3 3.5.5-r0 → openssl: OpenSSL: Denial of Service due to NULL pointer dereference in delta CRL processing
[HIGH] CVE-2026-28389 in libcrypto3 3.5.5-r0 → openssl: OpenSSL: Denial of Service vulnerability in CMS processing
[HIGH] CVE-2026-28389 in libssl3 3.5.5-r0 → openssl: OpenSSL: Denial of Service vulnerability in CMS processing
[HIGH] CVE-2026-28390 in libcrypto3 3.5.5-r0 → openssl: OpenSSL: Denial of Service due to NULL pointer dereference in CMS EnvelopedData processing
[HIGH] CVE-2026-28390 in libssl3 3.5.5-r0 → openssl: OpenSSL: Denial of Service due to NULL pointer dereference in CMS EnvelopedData processing
[HIGH] CVE-2026-40200 in musl 1.2.5-r21 → musl: musl libc: Arbitrary code execution and denial of service via stack-based memory corruption in qsort
[HIGH] CVE-2026-40200 in musl-utils 1.2.5-r21 → musl: musl libc: Arbitrary code execution and denial of service via stack-based memory corruption in qsort
